FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Price Above MA20 Signals Bullish Momentum Amid Iran‑Japan Strait Developments
tldr_points: USD/JPY holds above MA20 at 159.72, indicating short‑term bullish bias.
Iran’s easing of passage for Japan ships reduces geopolitical risk for yen‑linked trade flows.
Steady USD alongside Middle‑East tensions keeps upside capped near 160.50 resistance.
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY trades above MA20 at 159.72 amid mixed Iran‑Japan Strait news and steady USD; bullish bias with focus on 160.50 resistance.
FX.comment: Price above MA20 with bullish order flow and steady USD supports upside toward 160.50‑161.00.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Price Holds Above MA20 Amid AI Optimism and FedEx Spinoff
tldr_points: Price sustains above the 20‑day MA (7,430), indicating short‑term bullish momentum.
AI optimism and the FedEx Freight spinoff provide fresh fundamental support to the index.
Key resistance looms near 7,700; downside risk is managed with a stop below 7,350.
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 above MA20 at 7,581 on AI optimism and FedEx spinoff; bullish bias, target 7,700, stop 7,350.
STOCKS.comment: S&P 500 above MA20 at 7,581 on AI optimism and FedEx spinoff; bullish bias, target 7,700, stop 7,350.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] DOWN: Price Below MA20 Amid ETF Outflows and Macro Pressure
tldr_points: Price trading below MA20 signaling bearish momentum
ETF outflows and whale selling add fundamental pressure
Watch for break of $70K support for further downside
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD faces downside pressure as price stays below MA20 amid ETF outflows and macro uncertainty.
CRYPTO.comment: Price below MA20 with ETF outflows and macro pressure favoring downside
